description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5-alpine Docker image. Add a test stage with a job called test that runs pip install -r requirements.txt, then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt, then python ./setup.py develop, then flake8, then pylint golinks, then py.test --cov-report term-missing --cov=golinks tests -v. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, variables, or special rules.
